# Autonomous Software Engineering Agent - Copilot Instructions

This is a comprehensive multi-agent system for autonomous software development that addresses:
- Multi-agent LLM coordination for code generation, security analysis, debugging, and performance optimization
- Integration with real-world development environments and version control systems
- Unified testing methodologies for functional correctness, security compliance, and runtime reliability

## Project Structure
- `agents/` - Individual agent implementations (CodeGenAgent, SecurityAgent, DebugAgent, PerformanceAgent)
- `orchestrator/` - Central coordination system for multi-agent workflows
- `integrations/` - Version control, CI/CD, and development environment integrations
- `testing/` - Unified testing framework for functional, security, and performance validation
- `api/` - REST API for external integrations
- `ui/` - Web-based dashboard for monitoring and control

## Development Guidelines
- Follow multi-agent design patterns
- Implement comprehensive security scanning
- Include automated debugging mechanisms
- Integrate with Git, CI/CD pipelines
- Maintain unified testing standards
